title: Anti-aging products can be harmful to children’s health, potentially damaging their sensitive skin. Even so, the skincare and beauty industry has failed to take meaningful action i

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Anti-aging products can be harmful to children’s health, potentially damaging their sensitive skin.",
    "The skincare and beauty industry has failed to take meaningful action in preventing kids from purchasing anti-aging products.",
    "20 California state legislators sent a letter to the Personal Care Products Council urging the council to curb the trend of kids buying anti-aging skincare.",
    "The industry does not support children using anti-aging products.",
    "Assemblymember Lee introduced legislation to ban the sale of anti-aging products containing powerful active ingredients like retinol and alpha hydroxy acids to kids under the age of 13.",
    "Anti-aging products offer no benefits to kids.",
    "Children are influenced by social media to use anti-aging products that aren’t suitable for their skincare needs.",
    "The beauty industry in the U.S. is profiting off of kids who are buying and using anti-aging products.",
    "The industry should take concrete actions to safeguard kids from the unnecessary risks of anti-aging products."
  ]
}
```
